reasoning: The control SI-4 (2) focuses on automated tools and mechanisms for real-time analysis of system monitoring. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to enabling audit logging for real-time monitoring of API server activities, configuring audit policies to ensure detailed and timely log capture, and using admission controllers for security monitoring and policy enforcement. These mechanisms provide the necessary infrastructure for real-time analysis and monitoring within a Kubernetes environment.
title: System Monitoring | Automated Tools and Mechanisms for Real-time Analysis
